title: CI: Format doesn't work on master
body:
@gezalore since recent cleanup the "format" run doesn't seem to work on master (or likely on any other branches here but I didn't test it)

e.g. https://github.com/verilator/verilator/actions/runs/18082707004

```
Run if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
[master fe881db] Apply 'make format'
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)
remote: {"auth_status":"access_denied_to_user","body":"Permission to verilator/verilator.git denied to github actions[bot]."}
fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/verilator/verilator/': The requested URL returned error: 403
Error: Process completed with exit code 128.
```
code_blocks:
